testcase.name: hashPassword / verifyPassword rejects wrong password

testcase.name: signToken / verifyToken throws on malformed token (< 3 parts)

testcase.name: sanitizeString trims whitespace

testcase.name: sanitizeString returns empty string for whitespace-only

testcase.classname: sanitizeString uses default maxLen of 500
testcase.name: sanitizeString uses default maxLen of 500

testcase.classname: isNonEmptyString returns true for non-empty strings
testcase.name: isNonEmptyString returns true for non-empty strings

testcase.classname: isNonEmptyString returns false for empty or whitespace
testcase.name: isNonEmptyString returns false for empty or whitespace

testcase.classname: isNonEmptyString returns false for non-strings

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy name is "deadline-based"
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy name is "deadline-based"

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy CRITICAL without due date returns base 1000
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy CRITICAL without due date returns base 1000

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy HIGH without due date returns base 100
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy HIGH without due date returns base 100

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy MEDIUM without due date returns base 10
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy MEDIUM without due date returns base 10

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy LOW without due date returns base 1
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy LOW without due date returns base 1

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy overdue task gets higher weight than non-overdue
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy overdue task gets higher weight than non-overdue

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy due within 1 day gets 10x multiplier
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy due within 1 day gets 10x multiplier

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy due within 3 days gets 5x multiplier
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy due within 3 days gets 5x multiplier

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy due within 7 days gets 2x multiplier
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy due within 7 days gets 2x multiplier

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns true when due within 24h
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns true when due within 24h

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false for DONE task even if overdue
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false for DONE task even if overdue

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false when no due date
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false when no due date

testcase.classname: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false when CANCELLED
testcase.name: DeadlineBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false when CANCELLED

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy name is "complexity-based"
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy name is "complexity-based"

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy CRITICAL base weight is 400
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy CRITICAL base weight is 400

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy adds weight for estimatedHours
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy adds weight for estimatedHours

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy estimatedHours capped at 200 extra points
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy estimatedHours capped at 200 extra points

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy description adds weight
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy description adds weight

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns true for CRITICAL + TODO
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns true for CRITICAL + TODO

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false for non-CRITICAL
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false for non-CRITICAL

testcase.classname: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false for CRITICAL + DONE
testcase.name: ComplexityBasedPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate returns false for CRITICAL + DONE

testcase.classname: HybridPriorityStrategy name is "hybrid"
testcase.name: HybridPriorityStrategy name is "hybrid"

testcase.classname: HybridPriorityStrategy overdue CRITICAL task has high weight
testcase.name: HybridPriorityStrategy overdue CRITICAL task has high weight

testcase.classname: HybridPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate combines both strategies
testcase.name: HybridPriorityStrategy shouldEscalate combines both strategies

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy name is "linear"
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy name is "linear"

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for task without due date
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for task without due date

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for DONE task even if overdue
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for DONE task even if overdue

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for CANCELLED task
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for CANCELLED task

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for future due date
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for future due date

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns positive penalty for overdue task
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy returns positive penalty for overdue task

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy penalty increases with more overdue days
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy penalty increases with more overdue days

testcase.classname: LinearPenaltyStrategy describe returns string
testcase.name: LinearPenaltyStrategy describe returns string

testcase.classname: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy name is "exponential"
testcase.name: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy name is "exponential"

testcase.classname: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for non-overdue
testcase.name: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for non-overdue

testcase.classname: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy returns higher penalty than linear for same overdue
testcase.name: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy returns higher penalty than linear for same overdue

testcase.classname: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy caps at 2^10 = 1024
testcase.name: ExponentialPenaltyStrategy caps at 2^10 = 1024

testcase.classname: TieredPenaltyStrategy name is "tiered"
testcase.name: TieredPenaltyStrategy name is "tiered"

testcase.classname: TieredPenaltyStrategy 1-3 days overdue → 5 points
testcase.name: TieredPenaltyStrategy 1-3 days overdue → 5 points

testcase.classname: TieredPenaltyStrategy 4-7 days overdue → 15 points
testcase.name: TieredPenaltyStrategy 4-7 days overdue → 15 points

testcase.classname: TieredPenaltyStrategy 8-14 days overdue → 30 points
testcase.name: TieredPenaltyStrategy 8-14 days overdue → 30 points

testcase.classname: TieredPenaltyStrategy 15+ days overdue → 50 points
testcase.name: TieredPenaltyStrategy 15+ days overdue → 50 points

testcase.classname: TieredPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for non-overdue
testcase.name: TieredPenaltyStrategy returns 0 for non-overdue

testcase.classname: TaskPriorityContext rank sorts by weight descending
testcase.name: TaskPriorityContext rank sorts by weight descending

testcase.classname: TaskPriorityContext getEscalations returns only tasks that should escalate
testcase.name: TaskPriorityContext getEscalations returns only tasks that should escalate

testcase.classname: TaskPriorityContext getStrategyName returns correct name
testcase.name: TaskPriorityContext getStrategyName returns correct name

testcase.classname: TaskPriorityContext setStrategy changes algorithm
testcase.name: TaskPriorityContext setStrategy changes algorithm

testcase.classname: PenaltyContext getPenalty delegates to strategy
testcase.name: PenaltyContext getPenalty delegates to strategy

testcase.classname: PenaltyContext getTotalPenalty sums all tasks
testcase.name: PenaltyContext getTotalPenalty sums all tasks

testcase.classname: PenaltyContext setStrategy switches algorithm
testcase.name: PenaltyContext setStrategy switches algorithm

testcase.classname: PenaltyContext describe returns string from strategy
testcase.name: PenaltyContext describe returns string from strategy

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) getInstance always returns same instance
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) getInstance always returns same instance

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) reset creates a new instance
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) reset creates a new instance

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) subscribe + notify calls observer
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) subscribe + notify calls observer

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) unsubscribe prevents further calls
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) unsubscribe prevents further calls

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) duplicate subscribe does not double-fire
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) duplicate subscribe does not double-fire

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) observers are isolated per event type
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) observers are isolated per event type

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) getLog stores all events
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) getLog stores all events

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) clearLog empties the log
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) clearLog empties the log

testcase.classname: EventBus (Singleton) observer errors do not stop notification chain
testcase.name: EventBus (Singleton) observer errors do not stop notification chain

testcase.classname: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.created
testcase.name: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.created

testcase.classname: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.status_changed
testcase.name: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.status_changed

testcase.classname: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.assigned
testcase.name: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.assigned

testcase.classname: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.overdue
testcase.name: NotificationObserver generates notification for task.overdue

testcase.classname: NotificationObserver ignores unknown events
testcase.name: NotificationObserver ignores unknown events

testcase.classname: NotificationObserver clear empties notifications
testcase.name: NotificationObserver clear empties notifications

testcase.classname: AuditLogObserver logs all events
testcase.name: AuditLogObserver logs all events

testcase.classname: AuditLogObserver getLogsByEvent filters correctly
testcase.name: AuditLogObserver getLogsByEvent filters correctly

testcase.classname: AuditLogObserver clear empties logs
testcase.name: AuditLogObserver clear empties logs

testcase.classname: AuditLogObserver records entityId from task
testcase.name: AuditLogObserver records entityId from task

testcase.classname: OverdueCheckerObserver emits task.overdue event for overdue task
testcase.name: OverdueCheckerObserver emits task.overdue event for overdue task

testcase.classname: OverdueCheckerObserver does not emit overdue for DONE task
testcase.name: OverdueCheckerObserver does not emit overdue for DONE task

testcase.classname: OverdueCheckerObserver does not re-escalate same task twice
